title: Integrative multi-omics analysis and machine learning identify M2 macrophage-induced ferroptosis resistance in glioblastoma.
snippet: Glioblastoma (GBM) is characterized by profound intratumoral heterogeneity and an immunosuppressive microenvironment that drive therapeutic resistance and poor prognosis. While both tumor-associated macrophages (TAMs) and ferroptosis have been implicated in glioma progression, their functional interplay remains elusive. Integrating multi-omics data (bulk/si...
